title: facter
html:
facter

Inherit

The first `.rb` file in the `/path/to/dir/` directory will be executed.

FACTERLIB=/path/to/dir/ facter

The first `.rb` file in the `/path/to/dir/` directory will be executed.

facter --custom-dir=/path/to/dir/ x
